pi_items.source: Prompt explicitly lists these quantities for Pallet Alpha, and verifier.py checks exactly for these.
Prompt explicitly lists these quantities for Pallet Beta, and verifier.py checks exactly for these.
Prompt explicitly lists these quantities for Pallet Gamma, and verifier.py checks exactly for these.
verifier.py uses 85 as the pass threshold.

privileged_info_summary: I have confirmed that the target medical supplies and initial Odoo configurations are synthetically generated and explicitly injected into the 'odoo_inventory' database via setup_task.sh using XML-RPC. I verified that Pallet Alpha requires exactly 200 Med-Syringe 10ml, 100 Med-Saline 500ml, and 400 Med-Bandage Roll. Pallet Beta requires 300 Med-Syringe 10ml, 100 Med-Saline 500ml, and 600 Med-Bandage Roll. Pallet Gamma requires 800 Med-Gauze Pads 4x4, 600 Med-Surgical Gloves Size M, and 600 Med-Surgical Gloves Size L. All values exactly match both the task description instructions and the verifier.py logic.
